v_strong_ml.pdf.notes: Strong ML with metrics, 2 roles, 4 jobs total. MLOps keywords present.

v_weak_recent_grad.pdf.notes: Weak verbs everywhere, no metrics, no summary, soft skills as 'Skills'.

v_good_pm.pdf.notes: Strong PM with metrics + 0-to-1 story. Skills section soft (no hard tools).
